name: EFC (Everything Fact-Checked)
description: Fact-checking tool for AI-generated research reports. Catches 5 systematic failure modes: unit errors, fabricated interpolation, source conflation, stale data, and attribution laundering.

skills.name: Fact-Check Reports
skills.description: Systematically fact-check AI-generated research reports against primary sources.

skills.name: Extract Verifiable Claims
skills.description: Inventory every specific, checkable claim from a document with priority triage (P0-P3).

skills.name: Check Source Links
skills.description: Verify that every source URL in a report actually resolves and categorize the result.

skills.name: Verify Source Content
skills.description: Fetch cited URLs, extract text, and check whether the claimed figure or key terms actually appear in the source.

skills.name: Full Report Audit
skills.description: End-to-end audit: claim extraction + link checking + source verification + reliability verdict.

interfaces.name: fact-check
interfaces.description: Agent-agnostic SKILL.md — one file, zero dependencies, works with any AI agent

interfaces.name: EFC-Plugin
interfaces.description: GitHub Action for automated fact-checking in PRs
